## deleteTasksDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `delete-batch` command.

Drives the CLI subcommand `delete-batch` and the MCP tool `tasks_delete_batch`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
deleteTasksDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    taskIds: string[];
}, BatchResult<BatchDeleteItem>, z.ZodObject<{
    taskIds: z.ZodArray<z.ZodString, "many">;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    taskIds: string[];
}, {
    taskIds: string[];
}>>
```
